title: Moana and the Lemon Apocalypse
summary: A PRG32 arcade game about Moana gathering lemons before chickens and a rooster ruin the day.
description: Moana is a 6-year-old lemon collector racing through a bright grove. Lemons fall in pseudo-random patterns, expire on the ground, and are contested by chickens. Magic lemons add time, energetic lemons speed Moana up, bad lemons consume precious seconds, and a rooster periodically attacks until Moana scares him away by throwing lemons from her basket. Each screen lasts 150 seconds and ends with a door escape while chickens and the rooster pursue her.
